nodes.context: Commune, gang and cult led by Charles Manson, active in California in the late 1960s and early 1970s, responsible for multiple murders.
Motorcycle club whose treasurer Danny DeCarlo was involved with the Manson Family; members acted as security for the Family.
Militant political organization; Manson feared retaliation from them after shooting Bernard Crowe, whom he mistakenly believed was a member.
White supremacist prison gang; Manson found temporary acceptance from them at San Quentin.

edges.context: Manson brought in Straight Satans members as security at Spahn Ranch and had dealings with them.
Manson feared retaliation from the Black Panthers after shooting Bernard Crowe, whom he believed was a Panther.
Manson found temporary acceptance from the Aryan Brotherhood at San Quentin.
